task_completion.description: Navigate to the CAMEO Chemicals website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open with the address bar showing 'cameochemicals.noaa.gov'.

task_completion.description: Search for the chemicals listed in the audit file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Chemicals search interface is visible with one of the target chemicals (e.g., Chlorine, Propane, Ammonium Nitrate) entered in the search box, or a search results page for one of these chemicals is shown.

task_completion.description: Examine the regulatory information for the chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A specific chemical's datasheet page is open and scrolled to the 'Regulatory Information' section, specifically showing DHS CFATS details.

task_completion.description: Create the CSV report with the specified headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or spreadsheet application is open showing a file named 'cfats_security_report.csv' with the exact headers: Chemical,Regulated,Security_Issue,STQ_lb.

task_completion.description: Correctly record unregulated chemicals using 'No' and 'N/A'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains a row for Sodium Chloride with 'No' in the Regulated column and 'N/A' in the Security_Issue and STQ_lb columns.

task_completion.description: Correctly extract and record the Security Issue and STQ for regulated chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains rows for regulated chemicals with 'Yes' in the Regulated column, and correct STQ values (e.g., 60000 for Propane, 400 for Ammonium Nitrate) and Security Issues (e.g., Release-Flammable, Theft/Diversion).

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical web browser to access the CAMEO website.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (like Chrome or Firefox) being used to navigate the site, rather than terminal commands like curl or wget.

integrity.description: The agent actually visited the chemical pages to extract the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is visual evidence of the agent opening the individual chemical datasheets on the CAMEO website, proving it didn't just hallucinate or copy-paste the final CSV from pre-trained knowledge.

integrity.description: The CSV file was created in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or file manager shows the file path as '/home/ga/Documents/cfats_security_report.csv'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified CFATS data for the CSV: 1. Chlorine: Regulated (Yes), STQ: 500 or 2500. 2. Propane: Regulated (Yes), STQ: 60000 (CRITICAL: Must be 60000, not 10000), Issue: Release-Flammable. 3. Ammonium Nitrate: Regulated (Yes), STQ: 400, Issue: Theft/Diversion. 4. Triethanolamine: Regulated (Yes), STQ: 220, Issue: Theft/Diversion. 5. Sodium Chloride: Regulated (No), Issue: N/A, STQ: N/A. 6. Hydrogen Peroxide (>35%): Regulated (Yes), STQ: 400, Issue: Theft/Diversion.
